CustomField.formula: IF(DAY(TODAY()) = 2 && (MONTH(TODAY())=1 || MONTH(TODAY())=2 || MONTH(TODAY())=4 || MONTH(TODAY())=6 || MONTH(TODAY())=8 || MONTH(TODAY())=9 || MONTH(TODAY())=11), DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = TODAY()-1 || DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = TODAY()-2 || DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = TODAY()-3, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = TODAY()-1 || DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) = TODAY()-2)
CustomField.label: Created in the Last 2 / Days
